## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] chore: maintenance/tooling
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] refactor: code restructure (no feature/fix)
- [ ] test: adding/updating tests

## Versioning

- [ ] Commit message scope matches the package being changed (e.g. `feat(integration-fred-economics): ...`)
- [ ] This is a chore/docs change that does not need a version bump

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm run test:coverage`)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
